questions: technician er visit er charge ki?
answers: Technician visit request korun ISP Digital app theke ba 09612-000000 e call korun. Normal request e 24-48 ghontar moddhe technician ashbe apnar location e!
ISP Digital er technician visit er first visit FREE! Router issue, cable problem, ba connection setup — prothombar kono charge nai. Repeat visit er jonno 200 taka service charge lagbe.
Urgent technician dorkar hole amader emergency line e call korun. ISP Digital er emergency response team 4-6 ghontar moddhe apnar kache pouchhe jabe.
Technician er visit schedule korun apnar convenient time e — morning (9am-12pm), afternoon (12pm-4pm), ba evening (4pm-8pm). ISP Digital flexible scheduling offer kore!
Cable repair er jonno amra technician pathacchi. Fiber cable hole ektu beshi somoy lagte pare (6-8 ghonta), kintu regular cable 2-3 ghontay fix hoye jay.
Technician ashche na hole ba late hole amader ke janaben — amra immediately follow up korbo. ISP Digital e technician tracking feature ache app e, real-time location dekhte paren.
Weekend e o amader technician available thake! Saturday ar Sunday duitay service paben. Tobe weekend visit er jonno advance booking korun karon demand beshi thake.
Scheduled visit cancel ba reschedule korte app e giye 'My Appointments' e jan, ba 09612-000000 e call korun visit er 4 ghonta age. ISP Digital flexible scheduling e committed.
Maintenance schedule normally off-peak hours e hoy (raat 2am-6am). Planned maintenance er age ISP Digital SMS ar email e notice dey. Apnar service e minimum disruption hobe!
Technician er contact number directly dewa amader policy te nai, kintu visit er age technician nijei call korbe apnake. ISP Digital customer privacy ar safety ke priority dey.
